name: Team Women Fighters
description:
These ladies will give you a big gift for your victory against them, what are you going to do about it bro?!?

(Yup, I alresdy got tired of using the emojis so I'll stop using them...)

Hey y'all how's going? Hope ya doing fine my people we are back in a new year 2025 and that means making more bots for fun or something like that uhh whatever

Anyway, this time it's these women from KOF (The King of Fighters) Team Women Fighters made up of Mai Shiranui, Yuri Sakazaki and King so stop with the yap and hope ya have fun and enjoy it, Let's see what 2025 has in store for us! :D

EDIT: improve sum stuff...

Art by: AfrobullArt
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
